design_philosophy: Dense scannable file log with default-sort by recent; built for daily submit-and-leave operators.
strengths: Many file logs visible without scrolling
Default-sort by recent matches daily submit-and-leave flow
Submit-on-Enter from any field; minimal confirmation friction
weaknesses: Dense table can overwhelm during high error counts
Sparse help text; assumes prior knowledge of the workflow
tradeoffs: Faster for daily importers; less guidance for occasional or first-time users.
use_when: Daily importers who submit one or more files per business day.
